flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oxnard College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($644 → $818).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oxnard College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $9.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Oxnard College rose 95% between 2007 and 2010 (3.7k → 7.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oxnard College rose 66% between 2007 and 2010 (19.4% → 32.3%).
